title: arabis patula
intro: Arabis patula, also known as rock cress, is a flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are believed to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Arabis patula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
